meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: WorkClaw
products.tagline: Collaborative, proactive AI coworkers who work in Slack
products.summaryZh: 在 Slack 中协作、主动的 AI 同事
products.descriptionZh: 为你的团队配备AI团队。WorkClaws是协作型、主动式的AI同事，像其他同事一样在Slack和Microsoft Teams中工作。它们完全可定制，通过学习技能和例程，以你的方式完成工作。与大多数将一人与一个助手配对的人工智能产品不同，WorkClaws可以全天候与你的整个团队协作。每个Claw都有职位头衔、组织架构中的管理者，以及一台云托管的ClawOS计算机，能够访问超过3000个应用。
products.description: Meet the AI team for your team. WorkClaws are collaborative, proactive AI coworkers who work in Slack and Microsoft Teams just like every other colleague. They're fully customizable to get work done your way by learning skills and routines. Unlike most AI products that pair one person with one assistant, WorkClaws can collaborate 24/7 with your whole team. Each Claw has a job title, a manager in your org chart, and a cloud-hosted ClawOS computer with the ability to access more than 3,000 apps.

products.name: Reframe
products.tagline: Surf like it's 1999
products.summaryZh: 像1999年一样冲浪
products.descriptionZh: Reframe 是一款基于 Electron 的开源 macOS 浏览器，它通过内置的 Wayback 模式，重现了 Safari 1.0、Netscape 4.8、Firefox 1.0 和 Internet Explorer 5.0 的外观与体验。
products.description: Reframe is an open-source browser based on Electron for macOS that brings back the look & feel of Safari 1.0, Netscape 4.8, Firefox 1.0 and Internet Explorer 5.0, with a built-in Wayback Mode.

products.name: Slackbot’s MCP Client
products.tagline: Work across 20+ apps in Slack with multiplayer collaboration
products.summaryZh: 在 Slack 中跨 20 多个应用进行多人协作
products.descriptionZh: Slackbot 全新 MCP 客户端通过连接 20 多款应用（Atlassian、Linear、Canva、Zoom），将分散的 AI 工作整合至单一对话界面。用户可用自然语言指令让 Slackbot 跨工具执行操作——签署文档、更新工单、查看仪表盘——并将结果分享至团队频道，实现真正的多人协作。
products.description: Slackbot’s new MCP Client ends fragmented AI work by connecting 20+ apps (Atlassian, Linear, Canva, Zoom) to one conversational interface. Ask Slackbot in plain language to act across tools—sign docs, update tickets, view dashboards—then share results in team channels for true multiplayer collaboration.

products.name: Mellum by JetBrains
products.tagline: Fast LLMs for low-latency and high-performance workflows
products.summaryZh: 面向低延迟与高性能工作流的快速大语言模型
products.descriptionZh: Mellum 系列快速语言模型登场，包含面向超低延迟与高性能推理的下一代模型。
products.description: Meet Mellum, a family of fast language models, including a next-generation model for ultra-low-latency and high-performance inference.

products.name: pumaDB
products.tagline: a small hosted memory layer for AI agents
products.summaryZh: 一个面向AI智能体的小型托管记忆层
products.descriptionZh: 大多数AI代理工作流会在会话、工具和聊天之间丢失有用的上下文。常见的解决方案要么过于手动（如将笔记复制到文档中），要么过于笨重（如搭建数据库、向量存储或自定义RAG堆栈）。pumaDB为代理提供了一个简单的共享空间，用于保存和复用笔记、事实、偏好、项目上下文、转录文本、任务状态及其他有用的记忆。无需配置数据库、向量数据库或管理基础设施。
products.description: Most AI agent workflows lose useful context between sessions, tools, and chats. The usual fixes are either too manual, like copying notes into docs, or too heavy, like setting up a database, vector store, or custom RAG stack. pumaDB gives agents a simple shared place to save and reuse notes, facts, preferences, project context, transcripts, task state, and other useful memory. No database setup, vector DB, or infrastructure to manage

products.name: Are you in the Weights?
products.tagline: Find out if you live forever in the brain of the LLMs
products.summaryZh: 探索你是否在LLM的大脑中永生
products.descriptionZh: 权重是构成AI大脑的数十亿个数字。输入一个名字，看看主流AI模型对其识别强度如何。你的名字是否存在于权重之中？
products.description: The weights are the billions of numbers forming an AI's brain. Type a name and see how strongly the leading AI models recognize it. Are you in the weights?

products.name: Foyer
products.tagline: Build a room of ambient sound that lives in your notch
products.summaryZh: 在灵动岛中构建一个环境音空间
products.descriptionZh: Foyer 将环境音转化为空间。在黑色画布上，你是一个光点，每一声——噼啪的壁炉、喷泉、雨声、鸟鸣——都是你放置在自己周围的发光球体。拉近一个，它会膨胀；左右滑动，声音便随之移动。这是真正的空间音频，在你工作时，它会融入 MacBook 的刘海之中。
products.description: Foyer turns ambient sound into a place. On a black canvas you're a point of light, and each sound — a crackling hearth, a fountain, rain, birdsong — is a glowing orb you place around yourself. Pull one closer and it swells; slide it left or right and it pans there. It's real spatial audio, and it folds into your MacBook notch while you work.

products.name: Basedash Access Controls
products.tagline: Control exactly who can access your company data
products.summaryZh: 精确控制谁能访问您的公司数据
products.descriptionZh: Basedash 现已支持用户组与访问控制。可将用户归入不同组别——内部团队、外部客户、管理层——并为每个组精确配置所需权限：数据源、MCP 服务器、仪表盘、聊天及自动化功能。通过设置组的 AI 上下文，助手可根据不同受众给出差异化回答，而行级安全机制适用于所有查询。确保正确的人员看到正确的数据。
products.description: Basedash now has groups and access controls. Bundle users into groups — internal teams, external clients, leadership — and give each one access to exactly what it needs: data sources, MCP servers, dashboards, chats, and automations. Set a group's AI context so the assistant answers differently per audience, and row-level security applies to every question. The right people see the right data.

products.name: Pixlie
products.tagline: AI video studio: text & image to video, with real control
products.summaryZh: AI视频工作室：文本与图像生成视频，精准可控
products.descriptionZh:
Pixlie 是一个面向追求可控性创作者的 AI 视频工作室——而非黑箱生成器。浏览你的素材库，在云端排队任务，在应用内追踪渲染进度。pixlys.com 与 iOS 端使用同一账户。

不同之处：文本转视频、图像转视频、素材库与云端队列；精细化的创意工作流，而非“输入并祈祷”；已上线 iOS App Store；Google Play 网页版位于 pixlys.com。

由赫尔辛基的一位难民创始人独立开发，快速发布，在生产中迭代。
products.description: Pixlie is an AI video studio for creators who want control—not a black-box generator. Browse your library, queue jobs in the cloud, and track renders in the app. Same account on pixlys.com and iOS.What makes it different: Text2Video, Image2Video, library & cloud queue Granular creative workflow not just “type and pray” Live on iOS App Store; Google play web at pixlys.com -Built solo by a refugee founder in Helsinki shipped fast, iterated in production

products.name: GitSync for macOS
products.tagline: Visual GitHub management directly from a graphical interface
products.summaryZh: 通过图形界面直接管理GitHub
products.descriptionZh: GitSync 是一款 macOS 应用，可直接通过图形界面进行可视化的 Git/GitHub 管理。你可以同步本地项目与 GitHub、克隆仓库、创建新仓库，以及运行常见的 Git 工作流程，无需使用终端。
products.description: GitSync is a macOS app for visual Git/GitHub management directly from a graphical interface. You can sync local projects with GitHub, clone repositories, create new repositories, and run common Git workflows without using the terminal.

products.name: UISqueezy
products.tagline: Design tokens and Figma variables, always in sync.
products.summaryZh: 设计令牌与Figma变量，始终同步。
products.descriptionZh:
UISqueezy 自动双向同步设计令牌与 Figma 变量。将颜色、字体、间距、圆角、尺寸、断点和阴影令牌直接推送至原生 Figma 变量，并将 Figma 中的变更拉取回代码库。无需复制粘贴，杜绝数据偏差。  
- 双向同步：推送至 Figma，从 Figma 拉取  
- 原生 Figma 插件，数秒内连接任意文件  
- 设计与代码令牌的唯一真实来源
products.description: UISqueezy keeps your design tokens and Figma variables in sync, automatically, in both directions. Push color, typography, spacing, radius, size, breakpoint, and shadow tokens straight into native Figma variables. Pull changes made in Figma back into your codebase. No copy-paste, no drift. - Two-way sync: push to Figma, pull from Figma - Native Figma plugin, connect any file in seconds - One source of truth for design and code tokens

products.name: Inksightful
products.tagline: Search your handwritten diaries and notebooks
products.summaryZh: 搜索你的手写日记和笔记本
products.descriptionZh: Inksightful 将纸质笔记本和日记转化为可搜索的档案。用 iPhone 扫描页面，借助 AI 手写识别，日后无需翻阅旧页即可找到姓名、地点、想法和回忆。原始扫描件与文本保持关联，方便你核对来源。
products.description: Inksightful turns paper notebooks and diaries into a searchable archive. Scan pages with your iPhone, use AI handwriting recognition, and find names, places, ideas, and memories later without flipping through old pages. Original scans stay linked to the text so you can check the source.

products.name: TokenOps by Lovie
products.tagline: AI unit economics platform for AI companies
products.summaryZh: AI公司的人工智能单位经济学平台
products.descriptionZh: 面向AI公司的单位经济平台。TokenOps可捕获Anthropic、OpenAI、Bedrock、Google、Vercel AI、Azure等平台的每一次事件，核对月度账单，并通过30个工具的MCP接口，让智能体回答您的财务问题。
products.description: Unit economics platform for AI companies. TokenOps captures every event across Anthropic, OpenAI, Bedrock, Google, Vercel AI, Azure, and more, reconciles your monthly invoice, and exposes a 30-tool MCP so agents can answer your finance questions.

products.name: LocalForge
products.tagline: The last line of defence before your code hits git history
products.summaryZh: 代码进入Git历史前的最后一道防线
products.descriptionZh: 你正在快速开发或进行氛围编程，LLM的产出速度比你审查还快，三天后凌晨2点你还在轮换AWS密钥。LocalForge会在每次git提交最终确定前进行拦截。三层防护：Rust正则表达式在1毫秒内拦截密钥，Neural Engine上的CoreML通过统计方式捕捉不安全模式，本地Qwen LLM像人类一样审查你的代码差异——这一切完全离线运行在Apple Silicon上。没有任何数据离开你的Mac。
products.description: You're working fast or vibe-coding, the LLM is shipping faster than you can review, and three days later you're rotating AWS keys at 2am. LocalForge intercepts every git commit before it finalises. 3 layers: Rust regex blocks secrets in <1ms, CoreML on the Neural Engine catches unsafe patterns statistically, and a local Qwen LLM reviews your diff like a human and it's all fully offline on Apple Silicon. Nothing leaves your Mac.

products.name: Free AI Image Upscaler
products.tagline: Locally Increase Resolution of Images
products.summaryZh: 本地提升图像分辨率
products.descriptionZh: 使用客户端WebGPU模型执行，增强并清晰化照片细节。100%隐私保护，无需上传文件，零服务器存储。
products.description: Enhance and clarify details of your photos using client-side WebGPU model execution. 100% private, no file uploads, and zero server storage.

products.name: LeGink Creator
products.tagline: Youtube Content Creation Tool
products.summaryZh: YouTube 内容创作工具
products.descriptionZh: LeGink Creator 是为 YouTube 创作者打造的 AI 平台。输入主题，选择领域和语气，几秒内即可获得完整的发布级脚本——包括钩子、正文、行动号召、标题、标签和缩略图建议，所有内容均针对留存率优化，而非通用 AI 输出。粘贴频道链接，内容日历功能会分析你的领域，生成个性化的 10 天计划。内置编辑器支持提词器、AI 重写和 B 卷检查清单。免费计划，无需绑定银行卡。
products.description: LeGink Creator is an AI-powered platform built for YouTube creators. Type your topic, pick a niche and tone, and get a full publish-ready script in seconds — hook, body, CTA, titles, tags, and thumbnail ideas, all tuned for retention, not generic AI output. Paste your channel URL and our Content Calendar analyzes your niche to build a personalized 10-day plan. Built-in editor with teleprompter, AI rewrites, and B-roll checklists. Free plan, no card required.

products.name: ReleaseDock
products.tagline: AI support agent, help center & changelogs in a single inbox
products.summaryZh: AI支持代理、帮助中心与更新日志整合于单一收件箱
products.descriptionZh: 你的团队应该专注于打造产品，而非围绕产品的支持基础设施。ReleaseDock 提供统一的支持收件箱、一个不仅能回答问题还能执行操作的支持代理、托管帮助中心和更新日志，以及一个可直接嵌入网站并包含公告、支持等功能的组件。附：ReleaseDock 目前正为创始会员提供终身优惠！
products.description: Your team should be building your product not the support infrastructure around it. ReleaseDock provides a unified support inbox, a support agent that can not only answer questions but also take action. A hosted help center and changelog. And a widget that embeds right into your website with announcements, support, etc. P.S. ReleaseDock is currently offering a Lifetime Deal for founding memebers!

products.name: Math Shield - Focus & Unlock
products.tagline: Unlock Apps with Math
products.summaryZh: 用数学解锁应用
products.descriptionZh: Math Shield将应用锁定转化为学习体验。它并非被动地封锁应用，而是要求用户在获取访问权限前解决数学挑战。这对正在培养数学技能的儿童，以及希望提升心算能力、增强专注力、养成更健康数字习惯的成年人来说都很有用。
products.description: Math Shield transforms app blocking into a learning experience. Instead of passively locking apps, it requires users to solve math challenges before gaining access. It's useful for children building math skills and adults looking to sharpen mental arithmetic, improve focus, and create healthier digital habits.

products.name: Journnex
products.tagline: Trading journal + prop-firm fee & payout tracker
products.summaryZh: 交易日志 + 自营公司费用与支出追踪器
products.descriptionZh: Journex 将您的交易转化为清晰的分析数据——盈亏、胜率、R倍数以及0-100分的交易评分——同时提供自营公司追踪功能，用于对比费用与收益。更智能地记录交易，发现您的优势所在。
products.description: Journex turns your trades into clear analytics — P&L, win rate, R-multiple and a 0–100 Trade Score — plus a prop-firm tracker for fees vs payouts. Journal smarter, find your edge.

products.name: The Resistance
products.tagline: The hidden-role spy game you can play with friends online
products.summaryZh: 你可以在线和朋友一起玩的隐藏身份间谍游戏
products.descriptionZh: 在浏览器中免费游玩《抵抗组织》。这是一款适合3-12人的隐藏身份社交推理游戏。完成五项任务，揭露间谍身份，切勿轻信任何人。无需注册或安装：创建房间并分享链接即可。
products.description: Play The Resistance free in your browser. A hidden-role social deduction game for 3-12 players. Complete five missions, unmask the spies, trust no one. No account or install: create a room and share the link.
